programmes.show_description: The brutal murders of Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman shocked a nation, but even more horror awaited when police discovered who was responsible.
This week Lucy 'lives with' her most controversial host yet - Katie Hopkins. Lucy travels to Bristol in the UK to stay in Katie's home and gets to meet Katie's family and friends (SL)
Multi award winning and critically-acclaimed detective drama strand starring Robbie Coltrane as the wise-cracking Fitz, a brilliant but flawed criminal psychologist.
This channel is currently off air.
Britain's busiest airport opens its doors for an exclusive look at life inside one of the world's most famous transport hubs.
Ireland AM is the longest running daytime show in Ireland. Blending a mixture of lifestyle interviews and news content, with gardening, health, food and fashion seven days a week.
A mix of celebrity interviews, entertainment news, current affairs discussions, a look at sports competitions, health columns, cooking tips and tricks, and more.
The latest national and international news stories from the Virgin Media News team, followed by sport and weather.
Huge global hit game show The Chase is the ultimate heart-racing, high-pressure quiz.
Huge global hit game show The Chase is the ultimate heart-racing, high-pressure quiz.
Time is Money, TV's quickest quiz sees five players race to save their prize money. Sara Davies hosts.
Buyers Agent Liz 'O Kane tries to help a young couple see beyond their beloved Palmerstown; and get a single Mum into her forever home. PJ and Kevin confront their mortgage fears.
A real estate broker plays a message claiming her web designer agreed to return her deposit, while a cleaning-service owner says a former employee solicited her clients.

Joey thinks he's found his true love. Rachel's boss dates Chandler, creating big trouble for Rachel. Monica inherits a dollhouse.
Cain is in an accident. Jacob is left humiliated. Kerry confides in Jai.
Ronnie learns of Carl's latest ploy to extort cash from Debbie, Ben reels from the paternity revelation, Jodie joins David on his day off, and Hope taunts Will in front of Sam.
Ant and Dec assemble iconic ex-campmates to battle it out in brutal trials under the scorching African sun. In a show where legends are made, who will get a second chance at glory?
Comment and analysis on the big stories of the day in Ireland and abroad with a panel of guests covering the key issues.
Ireland's favourite TV critics give their assessment of the week's TV from the comfort of their own homes.
Presenter Lucy Kennedy heads to the Costa del Sol to live with ex-EastEnders star Danniella Westbrook, who discusses her troubled past and her plans for the future. (SL)
